assertions.rationale: Code does not set options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false. The AddIdentityServer call has no options lambda configuring KeyManagement at all.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddSigningCredential with the new key (from LoadNewKey()) and SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256
assertions.rationale: Code calls idsvrBuilder.AddSigningCredential(newKey, SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256) where newKey = LoadNewKey()

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddValidationKey with the old key (from LoadOldKey()) and SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256
assertions.rationale: Code calls idsvrBuilder.AddValidationKey(oldKey, SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256) where oldKey = LoadOldKey()

assertions.assertion: AddSigningCredential is called with the NEW key (not the old key), and AddValidationKey is called with the OLD key (not the new key)
assertions.rationale: AddSigningCredential uses newKey from LoadNewKey(), AddValidationKey uses oldKey from LoadOldKey(). The assignment is correct.
